programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Police hoped the shoe impressions found at a crime scene would put their investigation back on track.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When the head chef of a historic Philadelphia restaurant was found dead, investigators interviewed the usual suspects: family, friends and coworkers. As they sifted through the evidence, police uncovered a chilling tale of debt and deceit.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman is killed while walking her dogs in the woods. Since she has no enemies and her husband has an alibi, police assume it's a hunting accident - until they find a strange letter, allegedly written by the woman before her death.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The 1996 investigation into 48-year-old Martha Hansen's murder is helped by a legal requirement that bars have video cameras installed on the premises.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: California police had several suspects in the robbery and brutal murder of an elderly couple. Ten years later, a determined forensic scientist used material from a dentist's office to uncover ballistic evidence that had been overlooked.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When hunters found a skull in a Texas canyon, police found bits of clothing, small bones and a strand of hair. A forensic artist reconstructed her face. Now all they had to do was find her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The only clue recovered from a shooting is a twelve-guage shotgun. Scientists use unique methods to lift the serial number from the weapon to trace it to its owner

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A coroner finds telltale clues on the badly burned body of a murder victim, sending police in pursuit of a couple of killers.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When an 11-year-old girl disappeared from a small town in a remote area of Alaska, investigators wondered if she'd been attacked by a bear or become lost in the dense woods.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2002, the eyes of the world were on Virginia and Maryland. A serial sniper was on the loose, killing innocent, unsuspecting citizens. Just how was he caught?

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: After the murder of Seattle residents, evidence from the couple's dog eventually ties a murderer to the scene.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1999, a 12-year-old was found murdered in her home in Minnesota. Despite a meticulous search of the home and an exhaustive investigation, police had no suspects.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: An investigation into the murder of Katie Poirier is stymied by the lack of a body. Finally, investigators use a single tooth found among some charred remains to identify her.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman is found dead from a gunshot wound and police suspect her husband, however, forensic teams prove what really happened, and the truth is stranger than fiction.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In an affluent suburb, police were called to the scene of what appeared to be an accidental drowning.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1993, the Amtrak Railroad experienced the deadliest train crash in United States history when the Sunset Limited derailed while crossing Alabama's Big Bayou Canot bridge.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The body of 16-year-old Leanne Tiernan was discovered nine months after she disappeared. Forensic scientists found clues that painted a virtual portrait of her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A brilliant young architect became ill and died just before she was to testify in a criminal trial. The autopsy revealed she'd been poisoned with arsenic. Investigators had to determine which person who knew her had a motive for murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: After 6-year-old Michelle Lee Dorr went missing, her father confessed to murdering her. But investigators soon poked holes in his story, leaving the case unsolved for 14 years.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A neighbor watched as a man stabbed his wife, pushed her into the swimming pool and held her head under water.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A behavioral profile caused the Baton Rouge Police Department to search for the wrong man. They might not have made an arrest had it not been for a DNA picture of the suspect painted by a molecular biologist.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: After a street fight takes the life of a national wrestling champion, police must determine if he was killed in cold blood or in self-defense.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When more than 700 Oregonians contracted food poisoning from a unique strain of salmonella in 1984, investigators uncovered a secret plot to influence local elections.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1962, the people of the small town of Hanford, California lost their sense of peace when one of their own, 15-year-old Marlene Miller, was murdered.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A man died in his home after a history of heart disease. Rumors surfaced that the death was no accident.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2002, the eyes of the world were on Virginia and Maryland. A serial sniper was on the loose, killing innocent, unsuspecting citizens. Just how was he caught?

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The body of a wealthy American businessman was found in his rental car. Bone fragments were the only remains.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1984, a passerby finds the torso of a woman in a cardboard box. A forensic entomologist analyzes nearby insect activity to determine when the victim was killed.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The murder of an American tourist in a Mexican resort draws law enforcement resources in both countries.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Police led an intense search and relied on forensics when the mother of two young children went missing.

programme.title: Sheriffs: El Dorado County
programme.desc: The search of a vehicle reveals drugs and a handgun. A homeless person trashes a woman's house.

programme.title: Sheriffs: El Dorado County
programme.desc: A traffic stop reveals a man with stolen food and burglary tools who drives without a license. A deputy responds to a call about two intoxicated men. Two men are reportedly fighting at a department store.

programme.title: Sheriffs: El Dorado County
programme.sub-title: Just Another Day in the Life of a Deputy
programme.desc: A deputy finds an overturned vehicle with an intoxicated driver inside. A foreign national from Guatemala is arrested for driving with a suspended license. A traffic stop leads to an arrest on a felony warrant.

programme.title: Sheriffs: El Dorado County
programme.desc: Police seek to take down a known drug house where they expect many arrests. Deputies investigate a van parked after hours in a school parking area. Knives, bullets and marijuana are found in a suspicious car.

programme.title: Sheriffs: El Dorado County
programme.desc: An intoxicated man runs through the streets in his underwear; a couple fights in their car; a couple won't stop fighting.

programme.title: Sheriffs: El Dorado County
programme.desc: A woman's boyfriend is arrested for domestic violence. Police search for two missing tourists. A naked transient occupies a supermarket bathroom for over an hour.

programme.title: Sheriffs: El Dorado County
programme.desc: Deputies respond to a homeowner's report that people were stealing items from a neighbor's house. A woman is found driving her car with no license plate and a flat tire. A deputy is flagged down by another motorist to report an accident.

programme.title: Sheriffs: El Dorado County
programme.sub-title: Mexican Cartel Pot Grow in Our Backyard
programme.desc: Behind the scenes of the planning and execution of a large drug bust.

programme.title: Sheriffs: El Dorado County
programme.desc: A deputy checks in on a woman who is on probation and is about to be evicted from the motel room she's living in. A man's neighbors claim he is driving drunk. A traffic stop leads to a drug charge.

programme.title: Sheriffs: El Dorado County
programme.sub-title: You Can Run But You Can Not Hide
programme.desc: Deputies search for a man wanted for felonious assault and domestic violence. Police make a traffic stop on a person they had arrested in the past.

programme.title: Sheriffs: El Dorado County
programme.desc: We follow Deputy Bryan Payne up close and personal on his night shift as he goes about a typical day for a deputy in El Dorado County.

programme.title: Sheriffs: El Dorado County
programme.desc: Police attempt to arrest a drug dealer. A young woman is found lying on the side of the road. Officers try to catch people who are willing to buy alcohol for minors.

programme.title: Sheriffs: El Dorado County
programme.desc: Deputies search a house for a domestic violence offender and his wife is pretending not to know his location; a probation search on a repeat offender.

programme.title: Sheriffs: El Dorado County
programme.sub-title: I Broke Into the Vet's Office to Get a Pack of Cigarettes
programme.desc: Deputies respond to a burglary in progress. Deputies do a probation check and find a houseful of drug addicts and probation violators.

programme.title: Sheriffs: El Dorado County
programme.sub-title: A Big Dog & Bunches of Meth
programme.desc: Police respond to a scene where a person at gunpoint is in a vehicle reported as stolen. A man reportedly jumps from a moving car. Drugs are found in a vehicle that is stuck in a puddle.

programme.title: Sheriffs: El Dorado County
programme.desc: An attempted suicide is reported. An officer responds to an animal abuse call. Police do a gang sweep of a residential area in Lake Tahoe.

programme.title: Sheriffs: El Dorado County
programme.desc: An illegal marijuana grow operation is found in a mobile home. A deputy responds to a report of a loud and violent neighbor. A home burglary is interrupted by the homeowners.

programme.title: Sheriffs: El Dorado County
programme.sub-title: Grandma, Tell Me It Ain't So
programme.desc: An elderly woman claims she was assaulted, chocked and tied up by three armed assailants. A report of a woman acting erratically in the roadway. A juvenile claims his dad is beating up his mom.

programme.title: Sheriffs: El Dorado County
programme.desc: A woman says her husband was stabbed by three teenagers. A deputy looks for trespassers at a location where drug users are known to congregate.

programme.title: Sheriffs: El Dorado County
programme.desc: A deputy answers a 9-1-1 call about a lady stealing from a convenience store. A woman claims a prostitute solicited her husband in a restaurant.

programme.title: Sheriffs: El Dorado County
programme.desc: A father, worried about the behavior of his 15-year-old son, takes him to visit the El Dorado County Jail.

programme.title: Sheriffs: El Dorado County
programme.desc: A deputy responds to a house fire several days before Christmas. Later, he plays Santa to some kids who lost everything in the fire.

programme.title: Sheriffs: El Dorado County
programme.desc: Responding to a domestic violence call, a deputy confronts an angry, non-compliant man who refuses to identify himself. Deputies try to find out who shot a family's dog. A man is passed out in a truck.

programme.title: Sheriffs: El Dorado County
programme.desc: A deputy is called to assist after a hit-and-run accident. A 9-1-1 caller reports a fight between a husband and wife. Deputies respond to a report from a mother that her vehicle was taken without permission by her daughter.

programme.title: Sheriffs: El Dorado County
programme.desc: A woman with felony warrants is staying at a known drug house. The occupants of a vehicle in a routine traffic stop claim to be sovereign citizens and that the law doesn't apply to them. A burglary at a business complex.

programme.title: Sheriffs: El Dorado County
programme.desc: Police search for a robbery suspect who has a felony warrant for his arrest. Deputies respond to a call from a mother who claims her son is attacking her. A traffic stop leads to a drug possession charge.

programme.title: Sheriffs: El Dorado County
programme.desc: Officers do a probation search of a known heroin user. A person with two felony warrants has a propensity to evade capture. A motorcyclist is pinned between vehicles after an accident.

programme.title: Sheriffs: El Dorado County
programme.desc: Officers try to clear out several hostile transients who are camping illegally. A deputy describes a mental game he uses to keep him sharp while on patrol. A man refuses to leave a car dealership.

programme.title: Sheriffs: El Dorado County
programme.sub-title: A Day at the Drug House
programme.desc: A deputy follows two probationers into a known drug house. A water company worker contacting people about a water issue calls police about an extremely inebriated woman who fell down.

programme.title: Sheriffs: El Dorado County
programme.desc: Deputy responds to a report of shoplifting. The search of a motel room yields incriminating evidence.

programme.title: Sheriffs: El Dorado County
programme.sub-title: Just Can't Save Them All from Themselves

programme.title: Sheriffs: El Dorado County
programme.desc: Deputies respond to a burglar alarm at a hardware store and a call about drunk and disorderly people.

programme.title: Sheriffs: El Dorado County
programme.desc: A traffic stop reveals a man with stolen food and burglary tools who drives without a license. A deputy responds to a call about two intoxicated men. Two men are reportedly fighting at a department store.

programme.title: Sheriffs: El Dorado County
programme.desc: A deputy investigates a report of a man strangling a woman. Deputies respond to a report of a person screaming obscenities and throwing chairs. A deputy responds to a call for assistance from a department store loss prevention officer.

programme.sub-title: Follow the Bike with No Light

programme.title: Sheriffs: El Dorado County
programme.desc: The West El Dorado Narcotics Enforcement Team plans and executes the raid of a large drug cartel. The team converges on the operation of a mid-level methamphetamine dealer.

programme.title: Sheriffs: El Dorado County
programme.desc: A driver is passed out with his vehicle moving in reverse. Boat patrol officers find an inflatable boat that is losing air. Deputies respond to a call from a homeowner concerned about two suspicious individuals.

programme.title: Sheriffs: El Dorado County
programme.desc: Deputies respond to a parolee who is locked in a residence and known to have a weapon. A trained dog finds clues that a human would surely miss.

programme.title: Sheriffs: El Dorado County
programme.desc: A deputy responding to a call in the outlying area of the county finds a large illegal marijuana grow operation. An officer investigates several reports of petty theft.

programme.title: Sheriffs: El Dorado County
programme.desc: A sting operation results in the recovery of over 12 ounces of meth. An alarm goes off at a coffee shop. A report of a stolen vehicle at a gas station.
